languages.text: "Ха, Погонщица мертва. Я-то думал, на ее месте будем мы. Ваша Светлость, мы вернемся в лагерь и доложим полковнику".
"Ha, the Drover is dead. I thought it would be us in its place. Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we'll return to the camp and report to the colonel."
languages.original_text: "Ха, Погонщица мертва. Я-то думал, на ее месте будем мы. Ваша Светлость, мы вернемся в лагерь и доложим полковнику".

traits.locale_text: "Ha, the Drover is dead. I thought it would be us in its place. Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we'll return to the camp and report to the colonel."
"Ha, the Drover is dead. I thought it would be us in its place. Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we'll return to the camp and report to the colonel."
"Ha, the Drover is dead. I thought it would be us in its place. Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we'll return to the camp and report to the colonel."

languages.text: 「ハッ、ドローバーは死んだ。その代わりになるのは我々だと思っていた。君たち、我々はキャンプに戻って大佐に報告する。」
languages.original_text: "Ha, the Drover is dead. I thought it would be us in its place. Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we'll return to the camp and report to the colonel."

traits.locale_text: 「ハッ、ドローバーは死んだ。その代わりになるのは我々だと思っていた。君たち、我々はキャンプに戻って大佐に報告する。」

languages.text: "Ha, Çoban öldü. Onun yerinde biz oluruz sanmıştım. {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, kampa dönüp albaya rapor vereceğiz."
languages.original_text: "Ha, the Drover is dead. I thought it would be us in its place. Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we'll return to the camp and report to the colonel."

traits.locale_text: "Ha, Çoban öldü. Onun yerinde biz oluruz sanmıştım. {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, kampa dönüp albaya rapor vereceğiz."

languages.text: «Ja, el Pastor está muerto. Yo pensaba que caeríamos nosotros. Mi{mf|lord|lady}, volveremos al campamento para informar al coronel».
languages.original_text: "Ha, the Drover is dead. I thought it would be us in its place. Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we'll return to the camp and report to the colonel."

traits.locale_text: «Ja, el Pastor está muerto. Yo pensaba que caeríamos nosotros. Mi{mf|lord|lady}, volveremos al campamento para informar al coronel».

languages.text: “哈，拒生花死了，还以为这回死的是我们。大人，我们这就返回营地，向上校汇报。”
languages.original_text: "Ha, the Drover is dead. I thought it would be us in its place. Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we'll return to the camp and report to the colonel."

traits.locale_text: “哈，拒生花死了，还以为这回死的是我们。大人，我们这就返回营地，向上校汇报。”

languages.text: « Ha, le Chasseur est mort. J'ai bien cru que c'est nous qui allions y passer. Votre Seigneurie, nous allons retourner au camp pour faire notre rapport au colonel. »
languages.original_text: "Ha, the Drover is dead. I thought it would be us in its place. Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we'll return to the camp and report to the colonel."

traits.locale_text: « Ha, le Chasseur est mort. J'ai bien cru que c'est nous qui allions y passer. Votre Seigneurie, nous allons retourner au camp pour faire notre rapport au colonel. »

languages.text: "Ha, der Treiber ist tot. Ich dachte schon, es würde uns treffen. Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, wir kehren zum Lager zurück und erstatten dem Colonel Bericht."
languages.original_text: "Ha, the Drover is dead. I thought it would be us in its place. Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, we'll return to the camp and report to the colonel."

traits.locale_text: "Ha, der Treiber ist tot. Ich dachte schon, es würde uns treffen. Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, wir kehren zum Lager zurück und erstatten dem Colonel Bericht.
